rationale: RSI oversold threshold nudged 30->32 after 10 closed trades showed too many false entries during BTC sideways consolidation. Win rate below 40%.

new_value: MTF Fibonacci CHoCH pipeline (1H bias -> 15M signal -> 5M entry)
rationale: RSI strategy fundamentally flawed: single timeframe, no structure, no context. Replaced with multi-timeframe CHoCH (Change of Character) + Fibonacci retracement pipeline. Entry only on confirmed structure shift + price retrace into 38.2-78.6% zone on 5M. Grid optimiser shows IS Sharpe 1.0+ on BTC with this approach vs <0.3 for RSI.

Critical bug: half_spread defaulted to 0.0 in BacktestParams. All grid optimizer results were spread-free (overestimated edge). Re-ran optimiser with real MT5 ICMarkets EU Demo bid-ask spreads measured 2026-05-25. USDJPY/EURUSD/GBPJPY/EURJPY lost their edge after spread deduction. EURGBP/GBPCHF/CHFJPY went negative OOS. Active portfolio reduced to 6 pairs.

new_value: GBPAUD, BTCUSD, GBPUSD, USDCHF, XAUUSD, NZDUSD (6 active pairs)
rationale: Expanded from single-symbol BTCUSD loop to 6-pair portfolio. Per-symbol optimised parameters applied (grid search IS 2019-2022, VAL 2023, OOS 2024-2026). Total OOS reference: +159.24R. Suspended: USDJPY (+1.24R, Sharpe 0.15), EURUSD (+0.58R), GBPJPY (+0.73R), EURJPY (+0.12R). Removed: EURGBP (-9.99R), GBPCHF (-21.05R), CHFJPY (-26.23R).

new_value: 6 parallel MTFTradingLoops via asyncio.gather, per-symbol state dirs, shared status server
rationale: Phase 1 paper trading deployment. run.py rewritten as portfolio orchestrator. status_server.py updated with multi-symbol dashboard showing live R vs OOS reference per pair. Railway deployment live at hermes-trading-production-be93.up.railway.app. metatrader5 made Windows-only dependency (sys_platform==win32) to allow Linux container build.
